reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Gas station strategically located for tourists, money changers with good exchange rates, comfortable hotel

reviews.comment:
Los chicos de la playa muy buena atencion baños limpios, lo unico que para cargar agua caliente para el mate tenes que poner monedas para completar 5 pesos y ai no tenes monedas no tomas mate, tendrian que venderte fichas por lo menos asi es mas practico

(Translated by Google)
The guys at the beach were very attentive and the bathrooms were clean. The only thing is that to get hot water for mate you have to put in coins to make up 5 pesos, and if you don't have coins you can't have mate. They should sell you tokens at least; that way it's more practical.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMjl5eE13EAE

reviews.comment:
Atención personalizada y dedicada de los playeros. Baños siempre limpios y perfumados. Lugar cordial y bueno para comer o tomar algo de paso

(Translated by Google)
Personalized and attentive service from the beach staff. Restrooms are always clean and fresh-smelling. A friendly and pleasant place to eat or grab a bite while you're on the go.
